user.title: Enter your postcode
user.description: Enter your full UK postcode to find your address.

address.title: Select your address
address.description: Multiple addresses were found for {postcode}. Select yours.

error.postcode_not_found: No addresses found for that postcode. Check the postcode and try again.

init.title: Display options
init.description: Customise how waste collection information is shown in Home Assistant. The **Next Bins** sensor always shows all types collected on the next date grouped together (e.g. 'Recycling, Food waste - 3 days'). Per-type sensors track each waste type individually.

data.separator: Separator between waste types in Next Bins sensor
data.lookahead_days: Days ahead to include in upcoming attribute
data.excluded_types_raw: Excluded waste types — hidden everywhere (comma-separated exact names)
data.type_aliases_raw: Waste type display names — one per line: Original name = Your label
